Worker.name: Deep Space Worker
Worker.description: A low power 2-person tug with manipulator arms, designed for space construction and repair.

Torchship.name: Interplanetary Torchship
Torchship.description: A fully-crewed interplanetary transport with moderate defense capabilities, designed to traverse any star system with 1 g brachistochrone trajectories.

Starship.name: Relativistic Starship
Starship.description: An enormous mobile base with a relativistic shield, habitation and carrier capabilities, designed to traverse distances between stars at relativistic speeds over the course of decades.
